name: studio.publish_page
description: Thin 1:1 wrapper over Studio's publish_page endpoint. Ships the current draft of a specific page.
whenToUse: Ship an existing draft page after an editorial or HITL review has approved it.
Scheduled publish: set scheduled_at to a future ISO-8601 timestamp and let Studio schedule the go-live.
Batch-publish driver: iterate list_pages draft results and publish the approved subset.
whenNotToUse: Caller is editing and publishing in one step — use studio.update_content (hero) or studio.publish (hero alias).
Page is already published and unchanged — publishing again is a no-op but bills a round-trip.
Autonomous-mode call without operator approval — publish is MutatesState+public-facing; route through HITL first.
